solution.p: First factor out the leading coefficient from the first two terms, giving h(t)={3\mathopen{}\left(t^{2}+t\right)-1}\text{.} Then compute \left(\frac{1}{2}\right)^2={{\frac{1}{4}}}\text{.} Then
From the vertex form, we can see the vertex is {\left(\frac{-1}{2},\frac{-7}{4}\right)}\text{.}
